title: Shanks Saves Luffy from the Sea
description: On pages 38–41, this part follows the Romance Dawn flashback and focuses on how Luffy’s pirate dream is formed through Shanks, Higuma, and the straw hat promise.
scene: The danger reaches the water, where Shanks saves Luffy and pays a permanent price for that rescue.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: YOU PIRATES SPEND YOUR TIME FLOATING AROUND IN YOUR LITTLE SHIPS.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And you think you can stand up to mountain bandits? I dont make me laugh!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: YOU WERE SAYING SOMETHING ABOUT MOUNTAIN BANDITS AND PIRATES?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: DOESN'T MATTER. THERE'S A PRICE ON YOUR HEAD, ISN'T THERE?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oh no! I let him escape! We've gotta save Luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: CALM DOWN, CAPTAIN! WE'LL ALL GO OUT AND LOOK FOR HIM! WE'LL FIND HIM!!

summary: The bandit threat turns deadly, and Shanks saves Luffy from the sea. The rescue shows the seriousness behind Shanks’ carefree attitude.
